title: Add analytics_service unit tests
description: Create tests/unit/test_analytics_service.py with unit tests for analytics_service methods. Add test_get_sales_revenue_report_returns_dict (calls get_sales_revenue_report, asserts isinstance(result, dict) and 'start_date' in result), test_get_sales_conversion_report_returns_dict, test_get_customer_growth_report_returns_dict, test_get_pipeline_forecast_returns_dict (calls with a pipeline_id, asserts dict return), test_get_team_performance_returns_dict. Use a fresh AnalyticsService() instance.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_analytics_service.py --collect-only shows >=5 test items; pytest tests/unit/test_analytics_service.py -v passes all; assert isinstance(result, dict) for each method.
implementation_commit_msg: feat(analytics): add 9 unit tests for AnalyticsService
